case_title: BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. WILLIAM JAMES BOOTH et al

docket_entries.description: ORIGINAL SUMMONS RETURNED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT BOOTH, WILLIAM JAMES DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-20-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-16-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-05-2002

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-17-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-31-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR NOV-19-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO SERVED AUG-22-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BOOTH, WILLIAM JAMES
BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-20-2002 CONTINUED TO JAN-31-2003 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $426.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT BOOTH, WILLIAM JAMES
DECLARATION OF CHRISTINE CAMARILLO FILED BY PLAINTIFF BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-17-2003 CONTINUED TO MAY-05-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. MAR-17-2003 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOOTH, WILLIAM JAMES $14,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,680.00 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, $500.00 TREBLE DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,405.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-05-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
